ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1692. Professor of philosophy and practical medicine at the University of Padova. He followed Venetian ambassadors on diplomatic missions to England and Constantinople. A letter to father Caramelli (dated 5 October, 1682), describing experiments with vacuum taking place at the Accademia Sarottiana, is in Bibliotheca pisanorum veneta, vol. 2 (Venetiis 1807), p. 357.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
